title: The Four Pillars of a Modern AI Approach
description: A flowchart illustrating the interconnected components that define a modern approach to Artificial Intelligence, moving from data to intelligent systems.
relationships: Data & Compute Power fuels the ML Core algorithms
ML Core utilizes Neural Networks & Deep Learning for complex pattern recognition
The resulting models are deployed for Real-World Application & Integration
Feedback from applications improves Data, creating a continuous learning loop
